  "findings": [
    "Anchor point is inadequate and its 5,000-lb rating is based on guesswork rather than engineering or certification."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop all work relying on the suspect anchor point.",
    "Have a qualified person inspect, calculate, and certify the anchor point to meet the 5,000-lb requirement or design it as part of a complete personal fall arrest system with a safety factor of at least two."
  ],
  "rationale": "Using an unverified anchor point for fall protection during active work poses an immediate, critical risk of catastrophic failure and fatal falls. OSHA standards strictly prohibit guessing anchor capacities.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.502(d)(15)",
    "OSHA 1910.140(c)(13)"
  ]
}
